title: Verilog asynchronous reset pattern leads to corrupted `$check`, `$print` control signals
body:
### Version

Yosys 0.38+92 (git sha1 f7737a12c, clang++ 11.1.0 -fPIC -Os)

### On which OS did this happen?

macOS

### Reproduction Steps

```
read_verilog -sv <<EOF

module top(q, d, clk, rst);
	input wire clk;
	input wire rst;
	input wire [1:0] d;
	output reg [1:0] q;
	always @(posedge clk, posedge rst) begin
		if (rst) begin
			q <= 0;
		end else begin
			q <= d;
			$display("q <= %x", d);
			assert(!(d & (d - 1)));
		end
	end
endmodule

EOF
proc
dump t:$print t:$check
```

### Expected Behavior

The emitted `$print` and `$check` cells are conditioned on `!rst` and triggered by `clk` alone.

### Actual Behavior

The `EN` port of the cells in question is driven high by a constant, both `rst` and `clk` are on the `TRG` port as triggers.

``` 
  attribute \src "<<EOF:13.4-13.26"
  cell $check $assert$<<EOF:13$3
    parameter \ARGS_WIDTH 0
    parameter \FORMAT ""
    parameter \PRIORITY 32'11111111111111111111111111111110
    parameter \TRG_POLARITY 2'11
    parameter \TRG_ENABLE 1
    parameter \TRG_WIDTH 2
    parameter \FLAVOR "assert"
    connect \ARGS { }
    connect \A $logic_not$<<EOF:13$6_Y
    connect \EN 1'1
    connect \TRG { \rst \clk }
  end

  attribute \src "<<EOF:12.4-12.27"
  cell $print $display$<<EOF:12$2
    parameter \ARGS_WIDTH 2
    parameter \FORMAT "q <= {2:>01hu}\n"
    parameter \PRIORITY 32'11111111111111111111111111111111
    parameter \TRG_POLARITY 2'11
    parameter \TRG_ENABLE 1
    parameter \TRG_WIDTH 2
    connect \ARGS \d
    connect \EN 1'1
    connect \TRG { \rst \clk }
  end
```
code_blocks:
attribute \src "<<EOF:13.4-13.26"
  cell $check $assert$<<EOF:13$3
    parameter \ARGS_WIDTH 0
    parameter \FORMAT ""
    parameter \PRIORITY 32'11111111111111111111111111111110
    parameter \TRG_POLARITY 2'11
    parameter \TRG_ENABLE 1
    parameter \TRG_WIDTH 2
    parameter \FLAVOR "assert"
    connect \ARGS { }
    connect \A $logic_not$<<EOF:13$6_Y
    connect \EN 1'1
    connect \TRG { \rst \clk }
  end

  attribute \src "<<EOF:12.4-12.27"
  cell $print $display$<<EOF:12$2
    parameter \ARGS_WIDTH 2
    parameter \FORMAT "q <= {2:>01hu}\n"
    parameter \PRIORITY 32'11111111111111111111111111111111
    parameter \TRG_POLARITY 2'11
    parameter \TRG_ENABLE 1
    parameter \TRG_WIDTH 2
    connect \ARGS \d
    connect \EN 1'1
    connect \TRG { \rst \clk }
  end
